title: toona febrifuga var. glabrior
intro: Toona febrifuga var. glabrior, also known as the Queensland Toonbaloo, is a variety of the Toona febrifuga tree native to the tropical regions of Australia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, hence the name "febrifuga," and its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits associated with the Queensland Toonbaloo include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce swelling. To utilize the medicinal properties of this plant, it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap the health benefits.
